name: html-boilerplate
description: A minimal starter template for static HTML projects

scripts.dev: node scripts/cleanup-public && node scripts/copy-html && concurrently "npm run watch:css" "npm run watch:css:lint" "npm run watch:js" "npm run watch:html" "npm run serve"
scripts.build: node scripts/cleanup-public && node scripts/copy-html && concurrently "npm run build:js" "npm run build:css" && node scripts/inline-styles && node scripts/inline-scripts && node scripts/cleanup-public --ext=css
